description: As the managing editor, set up the content pipeline by creating three posts for the upcoming weeks. Create a post titled 'Q1 2026 Revenue Analysis' assigned to user 'editor' in the News category, scheduled for March 15, 2026 at 9:00 AM, containing at least 50 words about quarterly revenue. Create a post titled 'Spring Product Launch Preview' assigned to user 'author' in the Technology category, scheduled for March 20, 2026 at 10:00 AM, containing at least 50 words about product launches. Create a post titled 'Annual Team Building Event Recap' assigned to user 'contributor' in the Lifestyle category with a status of Pending Review, containing at least 50 words about a team event. Users 'editor', 'author', and 'contributor' already exist in the system.
